name: Frosty Orange Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
- For crust: Heat oats in a shallow baking pan in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for about 10 minutes. Combine the oats, coconut, sugar, and butter until crumbly. Press firmly onto the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie plate. Chill.
- For filling: Spread half of the ice cream in the pie shell. Drizzle with 2 tablespoons of the orange juice concentrate. Repeat layers once. Sprinkle with toasted coconut. Freeze until firm.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers, avoid using aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat," and avoid words like "destroy," "burn," "splutter," or "execute."
